nasb.text: Even Egypt, whose help is vain and empty. Therefore, I have called her “Rahab who has been exterminated.”

esv.text: Egypt’s help is worthless and empty; therefore I have called her “Rahab who sits still.”

cnv.text: 埃及的幫助是徒然的，是虛幻的， 因此我稱它為“坐而不動的拉哈伯”。

ccb.text: 埃及的帮助是徒然的， 所以我称她为“没用的海怪”。

csbs.text: 埃及的帮助是虚空的、徒然的， 因此我称它为 “静止不动的拉哈伯”。
